hermione_granger_starter.name: Hermione Granger
hermione_granger_starter.text: If you already have 2 or more lessons in play, then whenever you use an action to play a lesson card, you may play 2 lesson cards instead of one.

draco_malfoy_starter.name: Draco Malfoy
draco_malfoy_starter.text: During your turn, you may use an action and discard a card from your hand to look at your opponent's hand. You may then choose one card in his or her hand and discard it.

accio.name: Accio
accio.text: Put up to 2 Lesson cards from your discard pile into your hand.

hagrid_and_the_stranger.name: Hagrid and the Stranger
hagrid_and_the_stranger.text: Put a Creature card from your discard pile into your hand.

vermillious.name: Vermillious
vermillious.text: Do 3 damage to your opponent or to a Creature of your choice.

avifors.name: Avifors
avifors.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's F Lessons in play and discard it.

epoximise.name: Epoximise
epoximise.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's C Lessons in play and discard it.

forest_troll.name: Forest Troll
forest_troll.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your F Lessons from play.

incarcifors.name: Incarcifors
incarcifors.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Creatures in play and discard it.

take_root.name: Take Root
take_root.text: Your opponent chooses 1 of his or her Creatures in play and discards it.

draco_malfoy_3.name: Draco Malfoy
draco_malfoy_3.text: During your turn, you may use an action and discard a card from your hand to look at your opponent's hand. You may then choose one card in his or her hand and discard it.

dragon_s_escape.name: Dragon's Escape
dragon_s_escape.effect: Before each of your turns, your opponent takes 1 damage.
dragon_s_escape.toSolve: Your opponent chooses 3 of his or her Lessons in play and discard them.
dragon_s_escape.reward: Your opponent draws 3 cards or does 3 damage to you.

elixir_of_life.name: Elixir of Life
elixir_of_life.text: To play this card, discard 2 of your P Lessons from play. Shuffle up to 16 Non-Healing cards from your discard pile into your deck.

gringotts_cart_ride.name: Gringotts' Cart Ride
gringotts_cart_ride.effect: Before each of your opponent's turns, he or she chooses a card in his or her hand (if any) and discards it.
gringotts_cart_ride.toSolve: Your opponent skips a total of 5 Actions. (Those Actions don't have to be one right after the other.)

hannah_abbott.name: Hannah Abbott
hannah_abbott.text: Once per game, you may trade 2 cards in your hand for 2 non-Healing cards in your discard pile.

harry_potter.name: Harry Potter
harry_potter.text: Whenever you use an Action to draw a card, you may draw 2 cards instead of 1.

hermione_granger_10.name: Hermione Granger
hermione_granger_10.text: If you already have 2 or more lessons in play, then whenever you use an action to play a lesson card, you may play 2 lesson cards instead of one.

human_chess_game.name: Human Chess Game
human_chess_game.effect: During each of your opponent's turns, he or she can play cards only if you played 1 or more cards on your previous turn.
human_chess_game.toSolve: Your opponent chooses and discards 1 of his or her Characters in play (other than his or her starting character) or 8 cards from their hand.

invisibility_cloak.name: Invisibility Cloak
invisibility_cloak.text: Once during each of your opponent's turns, you may prevent all damage done by a spell card.

nearly_headless_nick.name: Nearly Headless Nick
nearly_headless_nick.text: Once per game, you may search your deck. When you do, you may take up to 2 Item cards from your deck, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Then shuffle your deck.

obliviate.name: Obliviate
obliviate.text: Your opponent discards his or her hand.

professor_filius_flitwick.name: Professor Filius Flitwick
professor_filius_flitwick.text: Once per game, you may trade 2 cards in your hand for 1 card in your discard pile that needs C power.

professor_severus_snape.name: Professor Severus Snape
professor_severus_snape.text: Once per game, you may shuffle up to 7 non-Healing cards from your discard pile into your deck.

ron_weasley.name: Ron Weasley
ron_weasley.text: Whenever you play a Character card, you use up 1 Action to play it instead of 2.

rubeus_hagrid.name: Rubeus Hagrid
rubeus_hagrid.text: Unique Whenever 1 of your creatures does 3 or more damage to your opponent, it does 2 more damage than it usually would.

troll_in_the_bathroom.name: Troll in the Bathroom
troll_in_the_bathroom.effect: Before each of your turns, your opponent takes 2 damage.
troll_in_the_bathroom.toSolve: Your opponent chooses 7 cards in his or her hand and discards them.

unicorn.name: Unicorn
unicorn.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your F lessons from play. You get 1 more Action on each of your turns (including the turn you play Unicorn).

delivery_owl.name: Delivery Owl
delivery_owl.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your F lessons from play. Before each of your turns, draw a card.

draught_of_living_death.name: Draught of Living Death
draught_of_living_death.text: To play this card, discard 2 of your P Lessons from play. Do 12 damage to your opponent or to a creature of your choice.

harry_hunting.name: Harry Hunting
harry_hunting.effect: Your opponent's Creature and Spell cards need 2 more Power to play.
harry_hunting.toSolve: Your opponent chooses 7 cards in his or her hand and discards them.
harry_hunting.reward: Your opponent may put a lesson card from his or her discard pile into play.

history_of_magic.name: History of Magic
history_of_magic.text: Look at your opponent's hand. Discard all Adventure cards from it.

incendio.name: Incendio
incendio.text: Count the number of C lessons you have in play, Do that much damage to a creature of your choice.

malevolent_mixture.name: Malevolent Mixture
malevolent_mixture.text: To play this card, discard 2 of your P lessons from play. Do 10 damage to your opponent or to a Creature of your choice.

meet_the_centaurs.name: Meet the Centaurs
meet_the_centaurs.effect: Your opponent plays with his or her hand face up.
meet_the_centaurs.toSolve: Your opponent discards his or her hand. (Your opponent may do this even if his or her hand is empty.)
meet_the_centaurs.reward: You play with your hand face up for the rest of the game.

mrs_norris.name: Mrs Norris
mrs_norris.text: Your opponent plays with his or her hand face up.

norbert.name: Norbert
norbert.text: To play this card, discard 2 of your F Lessons from play.

phoenix_feather_wand.name: Phoenix Feather Wand
phoenix_feather_wand.text: Play this card only is you have cards in play that provide at least 3C Power. If you play this card, and you already have a Wand in play, discard the old one.

platform_9_3_4.name: Platform 9 3/4
platform_9_3_4.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your lessons from play. You get 2 more Actions this turn.

potion_ingredients.name: Potion Ingredients
potion_ingredients.text: When a Spell card damages you, you may discard this card from play to prevent all of that damage.

raven_to_writing_desk.name: Raven to Writing Desk
raven_to_writing_desk.text: If your opponent has 2 or more Creatures in play, choose 1 of them and discard it.

shrinking_potion.name: Shrinking Potion
shrinking_potion.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to you.

titillando.name: Titillando
titillando.text: Do 3 damage to your opponent or to a Creature of your choice. Then your opponent chooses 3 cards in his or her hand and discards them. (If there are fewer than 3 cards in your opponent's hand, he or she discards them all.)

transfiguration_exam.name: Transfiguration Exam
transfiguration_exam.text: Discard all creatures from play (even your own).

transfiguration_test.name: Transfiguration Test
transfiguration_test.text: If your opponent has 2 or more Creatures in play, he or she chooses 1 of them and discards the rest. Then, if you have 2 or more Creatures in play, choose 1 of them and discard the rest.

4_privet_drive.name: 4 Privet Drive
4_privet_drive.effect: Your opponent can't play Spell cards.
4_privet_drive.toSolve: Your opponent chooses 6 cards in his or her hand and discards them.
4_privet_drive.reward: Your opponent may draw a card.

alchemy.name: Alchemy
alchemy.text: Search your deck. You may take up to 2 Lesson cards from your deck, show them to your opponent, and put them in your hand. Then shuffle your deck.

apothecary.name: Apothecary
apothecary.text: To play this card, discard 2 other cards from your hand. You may take a card that needs P Power from your deck, show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Then shuffle your deck.

apparate.name: Apparate
apparate.text: Discard the Adventure your opponent has played. You don't get the reward.

baby_dragon.name: Baby Dragon
baby_dragon.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your F Lessons from play.

bluebell_flames.name: Bluebell Flames
bluebell_flames.text: Do 4 damage to your opponent or to a Creature of your choice.

burning_bitterroot_balm.name: Burning Bitterroot Balm
burning_bitterroot_balm.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your P Lessons from play. Shuffle up to 10 non-Healing cards from your discard pile into your deck.

cage.name: Cage
cage.text: During your turn, you may discard this card from play and use an Action to choose a Creature in play (yours or your opponent's) and return it to it's owner's hand.

confundus.name: Confundus
confundus.text: Your opponent chooses 2 cards in his or her hand and discards them (1 if he or she only has 1).

diagon_alley.name: Diagon Alley
diagon_alley.effect: Your opponent can't use Actions to draw cards.
diagon_alley.toSolve: Your opponent skips a total of 7 Actions. (Those Actions don't need to be one right after the other.)
diagon_alley.reward: Your opponent may draw any number of cards.

dogbreath_potion.name: Dogbreath Potion
dogbreath_potion.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your P Lessons from play. Do 8 damage to your opponent or to a Creature of your choice.

draco_s_trick.name: Draco's Trick
draco_s_trick.text: Discard the Adventure you've played. You get the reward.

dragon_heart_wand.name: Dragon Heart Wand
dragon_heart_wand.text: Play this card only if you have cards in play that provides at least 2 C Power. If you play this card, and you already have a Wand in play, discard the old one.

fumos.name: Fumos
fumos.text: Do 2 damage to each Creature (even your own).

hiding_from_snape.name: Hiding From Snape
hiding_from_snape.effect: Your opponent can't play Item cards.
hiding_from_snape.toSolve: Your opponent chooses 4 Item cards in his or her hand and discards them.
hiding_from_snape.reward: Your opponent may search his or her deck for any card and put it into his or her hand. Then your opponent shuffles his or her deck.

kelpie.name: Kelpie
kelpie.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your F Lessons from play. Whenever a Spell card damages you, you may let Kelpie take that damage instead.

logic_puzzle.name: Logic Puzzle
logic_puzzle.text: Discard the Adventure your opponent has played. You get the reward.

mysterious_egg.name: Mysterious Egg
mysterious_egg.text: Search your deck. You may take a Creature card from your deck, show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Then shuffle your deck.

nurture.name: Nurture
nurture.text: Remove all damage counters from all of your Creatures.

ollivanders.name: Ollivanders
ollivanders.text: Put an Item card from your discard pile into your hand.

peeves_causes_trouble.name: Peeves Causes Trouble
peeves_causes_trouble.effect: Whenever your opponent draws 1 or more cards, he or she then takes 1 damage.
peeves_causes_trouble.toSolve: Your opponent skips a total of 5 Actions. (Those Actions don't need to be one right after the other.)

pet_toad.name: Pet Toad
pet_toad.text: Whenever a Spell card damages you, you may let Pet Toad take that damage instead.

pomfrey_s_pick_me_up.name: Pomfrey's Pick-Me-Up
pomfrey_s_pick_me_up.text: Put up to 3 non-Healing cards from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck (in any order). Then draw a card.

potions_exam.name: Potions Exam
potions_exam.text: Your opponent chooses 3 of his or her cards in play and discards them (if your opponent has fewer than 3 cards in play he or she discards them all). Your opponent may prevent this by discarding 1 of his or her P Lessons in play and discarding it.

reptile_house.name: Reptile House
reptile_house.effect: Your opponent can't use more than 1 Action to play Lesson cards during each of his or her turns.
reptile_house.toSolve: Your opponent chooses 4 of his or her Lessons in play and discards them.
reptile_house.reward: Your opponent may draw a card.

silver_cauldron.name: Silver Cauldron
silver_cauldron.text: To play this card, discard 2 of your P Lessons from play.

snuffling_potion.name: Snuffling Potion
snuffling_potion.text: Next turn, whenever your opponent draws a card, he or she discards it instead of putting it into his or her hand.

transmogrify.name: Transmogrify
transmogrify.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your Creatures from play. Search your deck. You may take a Creature card from your deck, show it to your opponent and put it in your hand. Then shuffle your deck.

unusual_pets.name: Unusual Pets
unusual_pets.effect: Before each of your turns, your opponent takes 4 damage.
unusual_pets.toSolve: Your opponent chooses 2 of his or her Creatures in play and discards them.
unusual_pets.reward: Your opponent may draw a card.
unusual_pets.text: Play this card only if your opponent has any Creatures in play.

vanishing_glass.name: Vanishing Glass
vanishing_glass.text: Play this card only if your opponent has any Lessons in play. Choose 1 of those Lessons and discard it. Search your deck. You may take a Creature card from your deck, show it to your opponent and put it in your hand. Then shuffle your deck.

winged_keys.name: Winged Keys
winged_keys.text: Once during each of your turns, you may choose 1 of your opponent's Creatures in play. Prevent all damage done by that creature until the end of your opponent's next turn.

baubillious.name: Baubillious
baubillious.text: Do 1 damage to your opponent or to a Creature of your choice. Then draw a card.

boil_cure.name: Boil Cure
boil_cure.text: Put up to 4 non-Healing cards from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck (in any order).

borrowed_wand.name: Borrowed Wand
borrowed_wand.text: If you play this card, and you already have a Wand in play, discard the old one.

cauldron_to_sieve.name: Cauldron to Sieve
cauldron_to_sieve.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's P Lessons in play and discard it.

dungbomb.name: Dungbomb
dungbomb.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to you by your opponent's Adventures and Creatures.

erumpent_potion.name: Erumpent Potion
erumpent_potion.text: Do 1 damage to your opponent or to a creature of your choice.

fluffy_falls_asleep.name: Fluffy Falls Asleep
fluffy_falls_asleep.text: Choose a Creature in play and return it to its owner's hand.

forgetfulness_potion.name: Forgetfulness Potion
forgetfulness_potion.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your P Lessons from play. During your opponent's next turn, he or she can't play cards.

foul_brew.name: Foul Brew
foul_brew.text: Do 2 damage to your opponent or to a Creature of your choice.

giant_tarantula.name: Giant Tarantula
giant_tarantula.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your F Lessons from play.

homework.name: Homework
homework.text: Put up to 2 Lesson cards from your hand into play.

hospital_wing.name: Hospital Wing
hospital_wing.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your P Lessons from play. Shuffle up to 8 non-Healing cards from your discard pile into your deck.

illegibilus.name: Illegibilus
illegibilus.text: Look at your opponent's hand. Choose 1 of those cards and discard it.

lost_notes.name: Lost Notes
lost_notes.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Items or Lessons in play and discard it.

noxious_potion.name: Noxious Potion
noxious_potion.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your P Lessons from play. Do 5 damage to your opponent or to a Creature of your choice.

out_of_the_woods.name: Out of the Woods
out_of_the_woods.text: Look at your opponent's hand. Discard all Creature cards from it.

pet_rat.name: Pet Rat
pet_rat.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your F Lessons from play.

pewter_cauldron.name: Pewter Cauldron
pewter_cauldron.text: To play this card, discard 1 of your P Lessons from play.

potions_mistake.name: Potions Mistake
potions_mistake.text: To play this card, discard 3 of your P Lessons from play. Choose 1 of your opponent's Creatures or Items in play and discard it.

remembrall.name: Remembrall
remembrall.text: During your turn, you may use an Action to put a Lesson card from your discard pile into play.

restricted_section.name: Restricted Section
restricted_section.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's T Lessons in play and discard it.

snape_s_question.name: Snape's Question
snape_s_question.text: Do 4 damage to your opponent. Your opponent may prevent this damage by showing you a P Lesson from his or her hand.

squiggle_quill.name: Squiggle Quill
squiggle_quill.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Items in play and discard it.

steelclaw.name: Steelclaw
steelclaw.text: All your creatures do damage to your opponent.

toe_biter.name: Toe Biter
toe_biter.text: Do 2 damage to your opponent. You may also choose a Creature and do 2 damage to it.

wingardium_leviosa.name: Wingardium Leviosa!
wingardium_leviosa.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to you by your opponent's Creatures.

wizard_crackers.name: Wizard Crackers
wizard_crackers.text: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a Lesson card, put it into play. If it isn't, put the card in your hand.
